title: Thinking in Bets / 对赌 - Customized Bilingual Companion Edition
author: Annie Duke
description: Customized bilingual Thinking in Bets EPUB with chapter briefs, companion notes, vocabulary support, and source Chinese translation.

sources.english: books/Thinking in bets/Thinking in Bets Making Smarter Decisions When You Dont Have All the Facts (Annie Duke) (Z-Library).epub
sources.chinese: books/Thinking in bets/对赌信息不足时如何做出高明决策(帮助你在面对不确定未来时,建立科学决策系统,做对人生关键选择) (安妮·杜克) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).epub

output.epub: output/Thinking in Bets/Thinking in Bets - Customized Bilingual Companion.epub

optional_sections.title: Chinese Edition Foreword
optional_sections.intro: This publisher-added Chinese foreword is useful context for visual review, but it is not part of Annie Duke's main book and can be skipped during listening.

optional_sections.title: Acknowledgments
optional_sections.intro: Acknowledgments are preserved as a source note but are omitted from the main listening flow.

optional_sections.title: Notes
optional_sections.intro: The source notes are long and reference-heavy, so they are treated as optional visual material rather than read-aloud content.

optional_sections.title: Selected Bibliography and Further Reading
optional_sections.intro: The bibliography is kept out of the listening flow to avoid long citation lists.

optional_sections.title: Index
optional_sections.intro: The print index is not useful for read-aloud study and is omitted.
